tasks.title: Audit

scope.description: Audit coverage tasks for internal/daemon and internal/project packages. Both packages already exceeded 94% target (95.0% and 94.4% respectively) when tasks ran; no code changes were made.

breadcrumbs.text: internal/daemon already at 95.0% coverage (target: 94%). No additional tests needed.
internal/project already at 94.4% coverage (target: 94%). No additional tests needed.

Audit PASS: Verified both packages exceed 94% target (daemon 95.0%, project 94.4%). Build, tests, vet, gofmt all clean. No code changes were made by this node's tasks, so no correctness/quality/documentation findings apply.

audit.result_summary: Both internal/daemon (95.0%) and internal/project (94.4%) already exceeded the 94% coverage target when this node's tasks ran, thanks to prior commits on this branch that added deep tests for daemon loop branches, iteration paths, lock/PID handling, scaffold services, and migration error paths. No additional test code was needed. Build, full test suite, go vet, and gofmt all pass clean.
